summary: Phase 4 Testing Complete: Production Registration Form, Machine Validation (MAQUINA1-14), and Restante por Pintar Column. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified with Playwright automation.

issues: Minor React hydration warnings (span inside tr/tbody) - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality. Already noted in iteration 9.

BACKEND: POST /api/production-logs defaults setup to 0 when not provided
BACKEND: GET /api/production-logs/{order_id} returns logs and total_produced
BACKEND: GET /api/production-logs/{order_id} returns empty logs when no production
BACKEND: GET /api/production-logs/{order_id} requires authentication
BACKEND: GET /api/production-summary returns aggregated total_produced per order_id
BACKEND: GET /api/production-summary requires authentication
BACKEND: DELETE /api/production-logs/{log_id} deletes log (admin only)

BACKEND: DELETE /api/production-logs/{log_id} requires admin role

Backend server.py lines 1193-1227: POST /api/production-logs correctly validates machine and order existence

seed_data_creation: Backend tests auto-create and cleanup test data (PROD_TEST_ORDER_001, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 Production features fully implemented and tested. Backend: POST /api/production-logs creates logs with validation for machine (MAQUINA1-14) and order existence. GET /api/production-logs/{order_id} returns logs and total_produced. GET /api/production-summary returns aggregated production per order. DELETE /api/production-logs/{log_id} is admin-only. Frontend: ProductionModal opens from Factory icon in header, allows selecting order, entering quantity/machine/setup, shows progress bar and production history. Restante column shows remaining quantity with color-coded progress bar (red <50%, yellow 50-99%, green 100%). Footer shows total remaining. Admin can delete production logs from history.

endpoints: POST /api/production-logs - Creates production log with order_id, quantity_produced, machine, setup
Order validation: Returns 404 for non-existent orders
frontend: data-testid='production-btn' - Factory icon button in header

endpoints: GET /api/production-logs/{order_id} - Logs and total for specific order
frontend: data-testid='restante-{order_id}' - Per-row cells with progress bars
Progress bar colors: bg-red-500 (<50%), bg-yellow-500 (50-99%), bg-green-500 (100%)

admin_delete.frontend: data-testid='delete-plog-{log_id}' - Delete buttons visible for admin
